item.title: Eli Lilly Corporate Resignations
item.description:
• Summary: Eli Lilly has seen the retirement of its chief technology officer after 35 years, part of executive changes at the company. This corporate resignation highlights leadership transitions within major biopharma firms.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News

item.title: Biotech Takeovers (Cytokinetics/Biogen)
item.description:
• Summary: There is ongoing speculation or news about potential takeovers involving Cytokinetics and Biogen, indicating consolidation trends in the biotech industry. Such M&A activities could reshape the competitive landscape and impact drug development pipelines.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
